author: lOrm
content: Implemented in src/tools/lsp.rs: is_lsp_connected(language_or_ext) -> bool with resolve_language_server() helper. execute_lsp gates at top with 'LSP server unavailable for {language}' error + install hint. Parity with CC LSPTool.ts:137-139 + manager.ts:100-110. 3 unit tests (fix650_*).
